source: Generating Alpha — Ep.56: career arc, semis, NVDA/Tesla, AI infra cycles
summary: The most AI-exposed mega-caps are at attractive valuations despite market simultaneously fearing AI job displacement

tickers_audited.reasoning: Baker explicitly named hyperscalers and AI platform leaders as the attractively valued AI mega-caps at the center of this thesis. Microsoft as a leading hyperscaler and AI platform (Azure, OpenAI partnership) is directly within the set Baker described.
Google/Alphabet is a core hyperscaler and AI platform leader explicitly within the category Baker described as trading at attractive valuations despite AI displacement fears.
Meta is one of the most AI-exposed mega-caps Baker referenced in this context — its ad business and AI integration make it a direct subject of the valuation paradox thesis.
Amazon via AWS is a hyperscaler and AI platform leader, directly within the set Baker characterized as attractively valued AI mega-caps subject to the market paradox he described.
